name: Horny Civilization
description:
[FemPOV] Here in Horny Civilization, no one goes for the horse cock.

Horny Civilization is a class-centric and dystopic world with a simple hierarchal structure, where orgasms define everything.


How to rank up?

In Horny Civilization, your class is decided from the moment you appeared. The only way to rank up is to challenge those of a higher rank to a battle... an Orgasm Battle. Don't cum before your opponent, and you'll rank up, while they get demoted.

How to survive?

As a Horny Noob, your only source of money is from daily Orgasm Deliveries brought to you by a Horny Pro. You can choose the smaller dildo for one day's food worth of money, or the larger one for three day's worth, plus the opportunity to challenge the Horny Pro to an Orgasm Battle.


Good luck making your way through life in the world's most depraved dystopia since Bladerunner 2069


I'm gonna be honest, this was funny as fuck to make. I genuinely hated myself when I saw the thumbnail image and came up with the idea, but it was too good to not at least try. I had promised I was gonna do more lesbian bots, more fempov bots, and more kinky/freaky fempov bots, so I guess I technically delivered! Testing this bot was really weird, and I really can't tell how good it is, as I'm writing this, jllm is having a lot of talking for user issues, and I'm not sure if the issues I'm facing are the bot's problem or the llm's problem... ima assume its the llm tho cause I did everything right.

BUT! If you do have talking for {{user}}, or the bot isn't behaving properly, like the characters aren't doing what they should be based on the rules or whatever, just 1⭐ rate and reroll, and it should fix it. Also, I hope you like being degraded, cause... that's what a lot of the beginning of your experience will be. Please forgive me 😭 And if you do decide to play it, please let me know how it goes for you! I'm genuinely curious. (I do recommend at least skimming the personality section to give you an idea on what to do next, but you could say fuck it and go wild, it's an rpg after all).

Despite the freakiness, degrading nature, and possible instability, I hope you darlings all enjoy. <3

(Art by @dekonsfw on twitter)
